form.formComment: Last start finished 7th over 300m at Taree Super Track beaten 25 lengths (18.95) behind Ripped Raccoon in a Mix 2/3 on April 11. More than capable and well placed to find her best form.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (23.57) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 7 length seventh. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 400m. Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.27) when fifth over 400m at this track in a Free For All. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from five starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Shy Hi beaten 6 lengths (23.49) in a Grade 5. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when third (23.40) over 400m at this track. Tough draw to overcome but can measure up.
